events.title: Introduction to White-Box AI
events.description: A beginner-friendly workshop exploring what makes AI transparent and interpretable. Learn the core concepts behind MLNomads' approach.

events.title: AetherLM Paper Reading
events.description: Community paper reading session on cosmos-inspired neural network architectures and their applications in language modeling.

events.title: Open Source Contributor Onboarding
events.description: Get set up to contribute to MLNomads projects. We'll walk through the codebase, tooling, and how to pick your first issue.
